center.name: 博爾巴 (亞馬遜州)
center.summary: 博爾巴 (亞馬遜州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Crimson-hooded manakin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: borbae is found along the Madeira River in Amazonas state from Humaitá north to near the Amazon at Borba. The crimson-hooded manakin inhabits a variety of landscapes, most of which are wet

links.label: 分布于
